prompt: Luxury fashion magazine cover, vertical portrait, featuring a poised young professional woman seated in a black leather office chair in a modern high-rise office. She has dark brown hair styled in a sleek high ponytail with soft side bangs, and wears a fitted ribbed short-sleeve knit top in deep burgundy, a high-waisted pleated midi skirt in taupe-brown, and a delicate silver necklace with small key-like layered pendants. She sits with legs crossed, holding a slim tablet across her lap, looking calm, composed, and quietly powerful. The setting is a polished executive office with a wooden wall panel on the right, floor-to-ceiling glass behind her, a blurred meeting scene with 2 indistinct businesspeople visible through the glass on the left, and a desk edge in the lower left corner with an open laptop and stacked documents. Soft natural daylight, refined editorial styling, realistic fashion photography, warm neutral tones, subtle background blur, premium magazine aesthetic. Overlay elegant magazine typography: giant serif masthead reading OFFICIELLE across the top in ivory white, small subtitle below the left side reading "STYLE. CONFIDENCE. CAREER.", date at top right reading MAY 2024. Add 5 cover lines total: left upper "DESK to DESTINY" with smaller subtext "Elevating everyday workwear with intent and ease.", left middle "POWER IN POISE" with smaller subtext "Refined staples and modern silhouettes for the woman who leads.", right middle "FOCUS & FLOW" with smaller subtext "Thoughtful style that keeps you confident from morning to night.", large bottom-left headline "MODERN ELEGANCE" with italic subheading "Polished looks. Purposeful days." and small text "Timeless style for the new generation of professionals.", and a circular badge at lower right containing "WORKWEAR EDIT" and smaller text "Burgundy tones, warm neutrals, effortless confidence." Clean balanced layout, upscale women’s fashion magazine cover, confident office-as-runway mood, highly realistic, sophisticated, cinematic softness.
